targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts AS time,
  CASE regime
    WHEN 'KOMPRESSION_STARK'   THEN 0
    WHEN 'KOMPRESSION'         THEN 1
    WHEN 'KOMPRESSION_SCHWACH' THEN 2
    WHEN 'TRIGGER_BULLISH'     THEN 3
    WHEN 'NEUTRAL'             THEN 4
    WHEN 'DISTRIBUTION'        THEN 5
    WHEN 'DISTRIBUTION_STARK'  THEN 6
    WHEN 'DISTRIBUTION_TOP'    THEN 7
    ELSE 4
  END AS regime_code
FROM signal_log
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ) / NULLIF(SUM(wm.amount_icp),0), 1)::float8
   FROM wallet_movements wm
   LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
   LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
   LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
   WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS "Flow 30T %",
  (SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ) / NULLIF(SUM(wm.amount_icp),0), 1)::float8
   FROM wallet_movements wm
   LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
   LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
   LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
   WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= CURRENT_DATE) AS "Flow heute %"

SELECT SUM(amount_icp)::float8 AS "ICP heute"
FROM wallet_movements WHERE hop_depth = 0 AND ts >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT extreme_score::float8 AS "EPZ Score" FROM epz_scores ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT score::float8 AS "Score" FROM signal_log ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(mandatory_sell_icp) FROM np_threshold_daily WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE), 0) AS value
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(taker_sell_vol_icp / NULLIF(taker_buy_vol_icp + taker_sell_vol_icp, 0) * 100, 0)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM liquidation_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM wallet_movements WHERE from_principal LIKE 'bef91947%' AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'

SELECT trigger_name AS "Trigger", schwelle AS "Schwelle", ROUND(wert::numeric, 2) AS "Ist-Wert", aktiv::int AS "Status" FROM (SELECT '① Minting Event' AS trigger_name, '> 0 (48h)' AS schwelle, COUNT(*)::numeric AS wert, (COUNT(*) > 0) AS aktiv FROM wallet_movements WHERE hop_depth=0 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '48h' UNION ALL SELECT '② Wallet Hop 0', '> 0 (6h)', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) > 0 FROM wallet_movements WHERE hop_depth=0 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '6h' UNION ALL SELECT '③ Aggregator aktiv', '> 0 (6h)', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) > 0 FROM wallet_movements WHERE from_principal LIKE 'bef91947%' AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '6h' UNION ALL SELECT '④ OB Bid Depth', '< 50.000 ICP', (SELECT ROUND(bid_depth_icp::numeric,0) FROM ob_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), (SELECT bid_depth_icp FROM ob_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) < 50000 UNION ALL SELECT '⑤ L/S Ratio', '> 5,0', (SELECT ROUND(global_ls_ratio::numeric,3) FROM liquidation_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), (SELECT global_ls_ratio FROM liquidation_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) > 5 UNION ALL SELECT '⑥ Perp/Spot Ratio', '> 3,0', (SELECT ROUND(perp_spot_ratio::numeric,3) FROM market_activity ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), (SELECT perp_spot_ratio FROM market_activity ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) > 3 UNION ALL SELECT '⑦ Sell-Ratio (NP)', '> 75%', COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(sell_pressure_ratio)*100,1)::numeric,0), COALESCE(AVG(sell_pressure_ratio),0) > 0.75 FROM np_threshold_daily WHERE ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '24h') sub

SELECT to_char(ts AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Zeit", LEFT(from_principal, 14) AS "Von", LEFT(to_principal, 14) AS "Nach", ROUND(amount_icp::numeric, 0) AS "ICP", hop_depth AS "Hop" FROM wallet_movements WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM ts) / 300) * 300) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS time, ROUND(AVG(mid_price_usdt)::numeric, 4) AS "ICP Preis" FROM ob_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT vah_price FROM volume_profile ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 2.90) AS "VAH", COALESCE((SELECT poc_price FROM volume_profile ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 2.40) AS "POC", COALESCE((SELECT val_price FROM volume_profile ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 2.27) AS "VAL"
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT sell_price_corr FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT oi_price_corr FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT best_lag_hours FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signal_log WHERE score >= 4 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days'), 0) AS value

SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM o.ts) / 900) * 900) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS time, ROUND(AVG(l.taker_sell_vol_icp / NULLIF(l.taker_buy_vol_icp + l.taker_sell_vol_icp, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Sell-Ratio %", ROUND(AVG(l.open_interest_icp)::numeric, 0) AS "Long OI (ICP)", ROUND(AVG(l.global_ls_ratio / NULLIF(l.global_ls_ratio + 1, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Long Accounts %", ROUND(AVG(1 / NULLIF(l.global_ls_ratio + 1, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Short Accounts %", 45.0 AS "OI Flush Zone" FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN liquidation_snapshots l ON to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM l.ts) / 900) * 900) = to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM o.ts) / 900) * 900) WHERE o.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM ts) / 300) * 300) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS time, ROUND(AVG(mid_price_usdt)::numeric, 4) AS "ICP Preis", 2.90 AS "VAH 2.90", 2.40 AS "POC 2.40", 2.27 AS "VAL 2.27" FROM ob_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH minute_data AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', o.ts) AS time, ROUND(AVG(o.ask_depth_icp)::numeric, 0) AS ask_depth, ROUND(AVG(o.mid_price_usdt)::numeric, 4) AS price, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(s.quantity_icp)::numeric, 0), 0) AS spot_vol FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN spot_trades s ON date_trunc('minute', s.ts) = date_trunc('minute', o.ts) WHERE o.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1), with_signal AS (SELECT time, ask_depth, price, spot_vol, LAG(ask_depth) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS prev_ask, AVG(spot_vol) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_vol FROM minute_data) SELECT time, CASE WHEN prev_ask IS NOT NULL AND ABS(ask_depth - prev_ask) / NULLIF(prev_ask, 0) < 0.05 AND spot_vol > GREATEST(avg_vol * 1.5, 100) THEN price ELSE NULL END AS "Iceberg ⚠" FROM with_signal ORDER BY time

WITH minute_data AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', o.ts) AS time, ROUND(AVG(o.ask_depth_icp)::numeric, 0) AS ask_depth, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(s.quantity_icp)::numeric, 0), 0) AS spot_vol FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN spot_trades s ON date_trunc('minute', s.ts) = date_trunc('minute', o.ts) WHERE o.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1), with_signal AS (SELECT time, ask_depth, spot_vol, LAG(ask_depth) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS prev_ask, AVG(spot_vol) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_vol FROM minute_data) SELECT time, ask_depth AS "Ask Tiefe (ICP)", spot_vol AS "Spot Vol (ICP)", CASE WHEN prev_ask IS NOT NULL AND ABS(ask_depth - prev_ask) / NULLIF(prev_ask, 0) < 0.05 AND spot_vol > GREATEST(avg_vol * 1.5, 100) THEN ask_depth ELSE NULL END AS "Iceberg ⚠" FROM with_signal ORDER BY time

panels.description: Composite Sell-Pressure Score 0–100. Ab 76: Extreme Zone.

targets.rawSql: SELECT extreme_score::float8 AS "EPZ Score" FROM epz_scores ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: EPZ Score

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (s_taker    * 0.32)::float8 AS "Taker Sell (32%)",
  (s_momentum * 0.23)::float8 AS "Momentum (23%)",
  (s_delta    * 0.20)::float8 AS "Price Drop (20%)",
  (s_oi       * 0.15)::float8 AS "OI Change (15%)",
  (s_ls       * 0.10)::float8 AS "L/S Shift (10%)"
FROM epz_scores ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ts AS time, extreme_score AS "EPZ Score", 76 AS "Schwellenwert"
FROM epz_scores WHERE ts >= $__timeFrom() AND ts <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Durchschnittliche Block-Failure-Rate pro Node-Provider. Hohe Werte = schlechte Performance = geringere Rewards.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    COALESCE(np.name, SUBSTRING(perf.provider_principal, 1, 20) || '…') AS "Node Provider",
    perf.provider_principal AS principal,
    COUNT(DISTINCT perf.node_id) AS "Nodes",
    AVG(perf.failure_rate_pct)::float8 AS "Failure-Rate %"
FROM np_performance perf
LEFT JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = perf.provider_principal
WHERE perf.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '35 days'
  AND perf.failure_rate_pct IS NOT NULL
  AND perf.failure_rate_pct > 0
GROUP BY perf.provider_principal, np.name
ORDER BY "Failure-Rate %" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 NPs: Failure-Rate (letzte 35 Tage)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts) AS time,
  COALESCE(SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ), 0)::float8 AS "Exchange / Aggregator",
  COALESCE(SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE (wl_d.label IS NULL OR wl_d.label NOT IN ('exchange','aggregator'))
        AND (wl_h.label IS NULL OR wl_h.label NOT IN ('exchange','aggregator'))
  ), 0)::float8 AS "Unbekannt / Staking"
FROM wallet_movements wm
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts) AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ) / NULLIF(SUM(wm.amount_icp), 0), 1)::float8 AS "Exchange-Flow %"
FROM wallet_movements wm
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts)
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Größte Empfänger ohne Exchange-Label. ICP Dashboard aufrufen und als Exchange/Aggregator/Staking klassifizieren.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wm.to_principal AS "Account ID",
  COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) AS "NPs",
  ROUND(SUM(wm.amount_icp)::numeric, 0)::float8 AS "ICP"
FROM wallet_movements wm
JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = wm.from_principal
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl ON wl.account_id = wm.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0
  AND (wl.principal IS NULL OR wl.label = 'unknown')
  AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '35 days'
GROUP BY wm.to_principal
ORDER BY "ICP" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Destinations — unbekannte Empfänger (manuell verifizieren)

panels.description: Principals die von ≥5 NPs Transfers empfangen haben. Verifizieren und in exchange_whitelist.json eintragen.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wm.to_principal AS "Account ID",
  COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) AS "NPs",
  ROUND(SUM(wm.amount_icp)::numeric, 0)::float8 AS "ICP",
  COALESCE(wl.label, '—') AS "Label"
FROM wallet_movements wm
JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = wm.from_principal
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl ON wl.account_id = wm.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0
GROUP BY wm.to_principal, wl.label
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) >= 3
ORDER BY "NPs" DESC, "ICP" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Aggregator-Kandidaten (auto-erkannt)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date::timestamptz AS "time",
  open,
  high,
  low,
  close,
  volume_icp AS volume
FROM ohlcv_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '500 days'
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  (funding_rate * 100)::float AS "Funding Rate (%)"
FROM funding_rates
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  oi_icp::float AS "Open Interest (ICP)"
FROM open_interest
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts
